name: Tactical Magnifier - Zoom Your Display
short_description: A tool that magnifies your display, made for tactical shooters with long engagement distances.
detailed_description:
Tactical Magnifier is a helpful tool for games that feature long range shooting.

It works by zooming in directly in the center of your display, enlarging every pixel.

  • Many customizable control options, including "combo keys" , "zoom while holding".

  • Not a cheating software, as it only makes use of the built-in Windows Magnifier.

  • Un-Noticeable performances, and invisible mode. It is a very light app

Tactical Magnifier is for you if :

  • You often lean on your screen to get a better shot.

  • You are visually impaired and cannot distinguish pixels on your display.

  • You have a high resolution display and want to take full advantage of it.

  • You are playing on a small display, or the display is far from your eyes.
